backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the ICDex grid trading bot with order management, bot start/stop controls, configurable grid parameters, activity logging, and timer-based order placement against the ICDex canister.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that defines the actor state shape (orders, config, log, timers) and provides a no-op `run` function for state migration between canister upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—IC0508 error handling and canister availability pre-checks—to their relevant frontend files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the frontend codebase structure and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app with a root div and module script entry point, titled 'ICDex ICP/ckUSDT Trading Bot'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component composing the full dashboard layout with a sticky header, responsive multi-row grid of trading panels, and a footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/ActivityLogPanel: Activity log panel that fetches and displays timestamped bot log entries with event-type color coding, loading skeletons, and empty/error states.
Displays bot start/stop controls with current running status, config summary, and error handling for the ICP/ckUSDT trading bot.
frontend/src/components/ConfigurationPan: Renders a form for viewing and editing bot configuration fields (spread, grid orders, interval) with validation, though saving is currently a no-op stub.
frontend/src/components/GridPreviewTable: Shows a scrollable table of current grid price levels split into buy and sell sides, with a computed mid price and refresh capability.
Displays the derived mid price from grid data along with a live/idle/stale/error status indicator and a relative-time freshness counter.
Lists all open orders sorted by side and price with formatted price/quantity/timestamp columns, and provides a cancel-all orders action.
frontend/src/components/TradeHistoryPane: React component that displays a paginated, reverse-chronological trade history table with buy/sell side coloring, status labels, and relative timestamps, fetching data via the useTradeHistory hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions (bot status, config, trade history, activity log, pending orders) and mutations (start/stop bot, cancel orders) with polling intervals and canister health checks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports JetBrains Mono, configures Tailwind base/components/utilities, and defines a terminal-themed dark color palette using OKLCH CSS variables along with custom scrollbar and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with JetBrains Mono fonts, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens (terminal buy/sell/neutral), custom box shadows, border radii, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the state of an ICP canister project (ID: erwl3-piaaa-aaaau-ae5la-cai) including known issues (IC0508 stopped canister error on startBot), existing error-handling features, and a pending backend health-check feature request.
